title: age-group — settings
description: Tenant-scoped policy for age-group provisioning + retention + reconciliation behaviour + resolver strategy. Compliance floors clamp retention_days up when the tenant's regulatory profile requires it (minor-safeguarding retention floor: 730 days for the row; audit rows stay 2555 days regardless).

groups.label: Age groups
groups.description: Tenant-wide policy for age-group provisioning, resolution, and retention.

sections.label: Provisioning
sections.description: How the seeded catalog is created for new tenants.

fields.name: async_seed
fields.label: Seed the default catalog asynchronously
fields.helpText: When on, the 10-entry default catalog is provisioned on a background queue after tenant creation. Off = created inside the tenant-provisioning transaction (slower but the tenant is never briefly catalogless).

sections.label: Reconciliation
sections.description: How the system heals default-group drift.

fields.name: alert_on_drift
fields.label: Alert on default-group drift
fields.helpText: When on, the reconciler pages ops on drift (a scoping tuple with 0 or 2+ defaults). Off = drift is only logged.

fields.name: auto_heal
fields.label: Auto-heal drift
fields.helpText: When on, the reconciler auto-heals drift by promoting the oldest row in the tuple. Off by default — surface + acknowledge before healing.

sections.label: Resolution
sections.description: How the resolver picks an age group when multiple candidates match.

fields.name: indeterminate_strategy
fields.label: Indeterminate resolution strategy

options.label: Refuse — force the caller to disambiguate (safest)
First match — return the first row by sort_order
Oldest group — return the row with the smallest min_age

fields.helpText: How AgeGroupResolver::resolveFor(...) behaves when multiple candidates match.

fields.name: prefer_sport_specific
fields.label: Prefer sport-specific groups over generic
fields.helpText: When resolving for an Athlete + sport_key, prefer the sport-specific override over the generic fallback. Off = always use the generic group; sport-specific groups become advisory-only.

sections.label: Retention
sections.description: How long archived age groups are kept.

fields.name: archived_age_groups_retention_days
fields.label: Days to hold archived age groups
fields.helpText: Days a soft-deleted age group stays recoverable. Compliance floor: 730 days. Default: 1095 (3 years — matches youth-development cohort windows). Enterprise tenants may extend up to 2555 (7 years matching audit retention).
